title: Junior Frontend Developer at IBM India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at IBM India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? IBM India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
